release_notes: Settings cleanup. You can now pick the Prompting model right in Settings (MiniMax M3, Gemini, DeepSeek), and the model list is simpler — transcription models are grouped into Local (offline & free) and Cloud (needs key), with a dedicated OpenRouter API key section shared by both. Removed rarely-used models (Base, Small/Medium Lite, Medium, SenseVoice) to reduce clutter. Local Whisper stays the private, offline default.
